name: GitHub, Star Count
description: Hero number: total stars across every public repo the user owns. Adds a 30-day cumulative sparkline that fills in as the widget renders over time (each fetch snapshots the day's total so the chart accumulates a real history rather than depending on per-stargazer pagination). Shows the top three star-earning repos below the headline. Token required (uses GitHub's GraphQL API).

cell_options.name: user
cell_options.label: GitHub username (blank uses the default from GitHub Core)
